sanskrit:
इति क्षेत्रं तथा ज्ञानं ज्ञेयं चोक्तं समासतः।
मद्भक्त एतद्विज्ञाय मद्भावायोपपद्यते॥
transliteration:
iti kṣetraṃ tathā jñānaṃ jñeyaṃ coktaṃ samāsataḥ |
mad-bhakta etad vijñāya mad-bhāvāyopapadyate ||
literal_meaning: Thus the field, knowledge, and the knowable have been spoken in brief; My devotee, understanding this, becomes fit for My state of being.
contextual_meaning: Krishna closes the map: body, data, and observer are one integrated system; only when the mind’s identity shifts from ‘owner’ to ‘devoted participant’ does the nervous system re-tune from threat-mode to trust-mode, making union with the Whole psychologically possible.
psychological_state: Post-insight consolidation: the mind has received a concise schema (body-knowing-known) and now needs an identity-level re-alignment to stabilize the insight into lived experience.
trigger_scenario: After a therapy breakthrough you suddenly ‘see’ how your body, thoughts, and awareness interlock, but only when you stop trying to ‘own’ the insight and instead surrender to daily practice does the shift stick.
anchor_text: Shift from owner to devoted participant and your body trusts life.
